race.comment: Former NSW galloper BLINKED (8) broke the maiden status in impressive fashion at Goulburn before being tipped out for further time to furnish. Has since tuned up for this with two recent trials and can run a big race while fresh. SIGNATURE TART (6) returned in good order with a dominant Gold Coast victory and will have derived some confidence from that win. Can go right on with the job now. PETITE PALACE (1) was a touch disappointing last time out but the form prior was good enough for a race of this nature. Capable of bouncing right back. GAYLORD (2) is resuming from a lay-off. Placed in a recent trial at Doomben to continue his good work in preparation for this. Opened last campaign with a win at Grafton over 1006m and could emulate that here.
